meta.title: Pablo Koll | Backend Software Engineer
meta.description: Backend Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable APIs, transactional systems, enterprise integrations, async workflows, and multi-tenant platforms.

about.headline: Pablo Koll
about.subtitle: Backend Software Engineer
about.subline: // Focused on integrations, distributed workflows, and reliable transactional systems. I use AI tooling pragmatically — to validate faster, prototype ideas, and cut through complexity.

items.description: Backend engineer working on retail systems processing ~10k daily orders across 12 international brands within an SFCC ecosystem. Focused on payment integrations, OMS migration, and cross-country billing workflows.
bulletsHtml: Worked on payment gateway integrations (Adyen, Redsys, Cybersource) for a platform processing ~10k daily events across 12 international brands
Contributed to OMS migration covering the full order lifecycle: orders, invoices, returns, and exchanges across ~80 countries
Extended and maintained billing and invoicing workflows aligned with country-specific tax requirements

items.description: Led technical delivery for ecommerce integration projects, designing and implementing Shopify Plus integrations with ERPs and third-party services. Worked across architecture, backend systems, and AWS deployments while collaborating directly with clients.
bulletsHtml: Built integrations between Shopify Plus, ERPs, and third-party services using REST and GraphQL APIs
Designed and deployed backend services and infrastructure on AWS for client ecommerce solutions
Worked directly with clients to define requirements, scope integrations, and deliver production-ready solutions

items.description: Built backend systems and integration middleware for ecommerce and B2B platforms, focused on multi-tenant architectures, async workflows, and cross-system data synchronization.
bulletsHtml: Took over and extended a multi-tenant middleware orchestrating order, invoice, stock, pricing, and catalog flows across Magento, VTEX, ERP, and carrier systems for 4 clients
Maintained a bidirectional Magento–Salesforce synchronization platform for Abbott across 8 Latin American countries, handling catalog, order, and CRM data flows
Implemented async processing pipelines with Redis and BullMQ for orchestration, notifications, webhook delivery, and background jobs

items.description: Worked on frontend and CMS-based web applications for multiple client projects using React, Vue.js, Laravel, and WordPress.
bulletsHtml: Developed Vue.js landing pages for Toyota (Hino Trucks) optimized for SEO and performance
Built React-based UI components and admin features for client web platforms
Maintained and customized Laravel and WordPress CMS solutions across client projects

items.name: Backend & Languages
items.description: Node.js, Express.js, NestJS, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, C/C++

items.name: Databases & ORMs
items.description: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Prisma, Sequelize

items.name: DevOps & Infra
items.description: Docker, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Git, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Linux

items.name: Frontend & APIs
items.description: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Astro, Liquid, Tailwind, REST, GraphQL, SOAP, Webhooks

learning.title: Current Focus
learning.subtitle: // What I'm learning and working on

items.name: learning_golang
items.description: Diving into Go's concurrency patterns, goroutines, and channels. Building microservices to understand its performance benefits and simplicity for backend systems.

items.name: vim
items.description: Vim is how I move through a computer. Keyboard-first workflows, low friction, and tools built around speed and focus.

items.name: obsidian_notes
items.description: Using Obsidian for knowledge management and building a personal knowledge base. Creating interconnected notes, linking ideas, and maintaining a second brain for technical concepts and learnings.

items.name: ai_tooling
items.description: Using AI tooling to accelerate development workflows, prototype integrations, and automate repetitive engineering tasks.

contact.headline: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: // Contact to drink a coffee.
contact.paragraph: Available for freelance and remote work. I enjoy working with a clear plan, helping teams make sharp technical decisions, and building backend systems from scratch — architecture, deployment, and long-term maintainability.
